---
date: 2026-05-30
---

## Posit Blog (3 latest)

- (2026-05) **What's new in Posit Team for Snowflake: May 2026**: Accelerate data science on Snowflake with Posit Assistant, a new governed AI agent, and idle timeouts. https://posit.co/blog/posit-team-snowflake-update-posit-assistant-idle-timeouts
- (2026-04) **Posit Connect Goes GA in the Snowflake Native App**: Posit Connect is now generally available as a Snowflake Native App, with Posit Package Manager entering Public Preview. https://posit.co/blog/posit-connect-goes-ga-snowflake-native-app
- (2026-05) **A New Home for Posit Open Source**: Announcing a new central hub connecting you to open source software, blog posts, and more. https://posit.co/blog/new-home-posit-open-source

## Tidyverse Blog (3 latest)

- (2026-04-27) **processx 3.9.0**: Kernel-level process pipelines, pseudo-terminal support on Windows, and Linux parent-death signals. https://www.tidyverse.org/blog/2026/04/processx-3-9-0/
- (2026-03-31) **tabpfn 0.1.0**: A new R package for tabular deep learning models. https://www.tidyverse.org/blog/2026/03/tabpfn-0-1-0/
- (2026-03-20) **2026 Posit Internships**: Posit is sponsoring four summer internship positions in 2026. https://www.tidyverse.org/blog/2026/03/2026-internships/

## Shiny Blog (3 latest)

- (2026-05-26) **Introducing Toolbars: Supercharge your Cards and Inputs**: New compact components in bslib and py-shiny for fitting buttons, selects, and other inputs into tight spaces. https://opensource.posit.co/blog/2026-05-26_introducing-toolbars/
- (2026-04-02) **Shiny for Python 1.6 brings toolbars and OpenTelemetry**: Includes toolbar components for compact UIs and built-in OpenTelemetry support for production observability. https://opensource.posit.co/blog/2026-04-02_shiny-python-1.6/
- (2026-01-22) **Where Questions Become Queries: Meet querychat**: A multilingual drop-in component for Shiny that allows you to chat with your data using natural language queries. https://opensource.posit.co/blog/2026-01-22_querychat-python-r/

## Quarto Blog (3 latest)

- (2026-05-07) **The Quarto Blog has a new home!**: The Quarto blog has moved to the Posit Open Source website. https://quarto.org/docs/blog/posts/2026-05-07-new-blog-home/
- (2026-05-06) **Quarto 2: Parsing and Source Maps**: Why Quarto 2 ships its own Markdown parser with actionable syntax errors and stable syntax. https://quarto.org/docs/blog/posts/2026-05-05-quarto-2-parsing/
- (2026-04-14) **Chrome Headless Shell in Quarto**: Quarto 1.9 replaces Puppeteer Chromium with Chrome Headless Shell — smaller, arm64-ready, and Docker-friendly. https://quarto.org/docs/blog/posts/2026-04-14-chrome-headless-shell/

***

## The Test Set Podcast (latest episode)

- (ep 22) **The Wonder-Driven Builder — with Paige Bailey**: Paige Bailey, developer relations engineering lead at Google DeepMind, discusses her path from planetary science to TensorFlow, and why statisticians have a hidden edge in the age of AI. https://posit.co/thetestset/episode/the-wonder-driven-builder-with-paige-bailey

***

## Posit Videos (2 latest — only 2 Video/Webinar/Product demo items available on page 1)

- (2026-05-12) **Compliance Without Friction: Mastering the Persistent Analysis Lifecycle** - Matt Wallace: Walk through how Posit's modern platform streamlines the entire data science lifecycle from request to delivery. https://posit.co/webinar/compliance-without-friction-mastering-the-persistent-analysis-lifecycle
- (2026-04-29) **Introducing Posit AI for Positron and RStudio** - Nick Rohrbaugh, Tom Mock: Demo of Posit Assistant, an AI coding agent that lives inside RStudio and Positron with access to your live session context. https://posit.co/workflow-demo/introducing-posit-ai-positron-and-rstudio

## Recent Posit Events (2 most recent past)

- (2026-05-28) **Chris Gates**: Director of Bioinformatics Core at University of Michigan discusses using statistics, molecular biology, and data science to identify patterns in DNA. https://posit.co/data-science-hangout/chris-gates
- (2026-05-21) **Gabriela de Queiroz, Dan Boisvert, & Makarand Malu**: Data Career Panel covering career progression, building culture, and turning ideas into scalable businesses. https://posit.co/data-science-hangout/gabriela-de-queiroz-dan-boisvert-makarand-malu

## Upcoming Posit Events (next 3)

- (2026-05-31) **Posit at PharmaSUG 2026**: Join Posit in Boston May 31–June 3 for live demos and talks on open source, AI, and clinical data science. https://posit.co/events/posit-pharmasug-2026
- (2026-06-01) **Posit at Snowflake Summit 2026**: Discover how the Posit Team Native App brings AI-assisted, open-source data science into the Snowflake AI Data Cloud. https://posit.co/events/posit-snowflake-summit-2026
- (2026-06-04) **Amy Rossi**: Data Science Hangout with Amy, Chief People Officer at Posit, on self-leadership during AI transformation and the importance of community. https://posit.co/data-science-hangout/amy-rossi
